# Shaytye Organizing

> Professional home organizer based in Almere, working in Amsterdam and across the Netherlands. Shaytye helps you bring back calm, structure and overview in your home or workspace, with organizing systems that keep working long after the session.

Shaytye Organizing is run by Shanice Chin A Joe, a professional organizer with a passion for order and calm. Sessions are hands-on, non-judgmental and tailored to each space — from a single closet to a full home. You always decide what stays, gets donated or discarded; Shanice advises but never takes the final decision. Every project starts with a free, no-obligation intro call via Zoom or FaceTime. Rated 5.0 out of 5 on Google (9 reviews).

## Services

- Standard — 3 hours, €135: basic decluttering and detailed ordering of one room, closet or clutter corner.
- Advanced — 6 hours, €270: extensive declutter and organizing session, rearranging together for more overview, small styling tips.
- Pro — 9 hours (full day), €405: in-depth organization of multiple zones (e.g. wardrobe + bedroom + admin), complete space make-over.
- Custom — price on request: multi-day projects and full homes, plan fully tailored to your situation.

Every booking starts from a minimum of 3 hours. Standard is paid fully in advance via Tikkie; Advanced and Pro are a deposit upfront and the rest in cash afterwards.

## Service area

- Almere (home base)
- Amsterdam
- The rest of the Netherlands on request

## Key info

- Website: https://shaytye.com/
- Languages: Dutch and English
- Rating: 5.0 out of 5 on Google (9 reviews)
- Payment: Tikkie (deposit or full) and cash
- Contact: contact@shaytye.com
- Booking: free 15-minute intro call via Zoom or FaceTime
